signals.headline: Kevin Warsh Nominated by President Trump as Next Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Nominated by President Trump as Next Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump's nomination of former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve Chair has been widely reported, sparking immediate market reactions including a weakening South Korean won amid uncertainty over U.S. monetary policy, inflation strategy, and Fed independence.[3][4]
